shadcn-html / toggle-group

JS

Toggle Group

A set of two-state buttons that can be toggled on or off. Supports single (radio-like) and multiple (checkbox-like) selection modes with arrow key navigation.

Component Specification — components/toggle-group/toggle-group.md

Native basis

role="group" container with .toggle buttons. Single or multiple selection.

Web Platform APIs

role="group" aria-pressed

Type

singleOne item at a time (radio-like) multipleAny combination (checkbox-like)

Single selection

Only one item can be active at a time.

<div class="toggle-group" role="group" aria-label="Alignment" data-type="single">
  <button class="toggle" aria-pressed="true">...</button>
  <button class="toggle" aria-pressed="false">...</button>
  <button class="toggle" aria-pressed="false">...</button>
</div>

Multiple selection

Any combination of items can be active.

<div class="toggle-group" role="group" aria-label="Formatting" data-type="multiple">
  <button class="toggle" aria-pressed="true">...</button>
  <button class="toggle" aria-pressed="false">...</button>
  <button class="toggle" aria-pressed="false">...</button>
</div>

Outline variant

Bordered toggles with shadow.

<div class="toggle-group" data-variant="outline" data-type="single" ...>
  ...
</div>

Sizes

Small, default, and large.

<div class="toggle-group" data-size="sm" ...>...</div>
<div class="toggle-group" ...>...</div>
<div class="toggle-group" data-size="lg" ...>...</div>

With spacing

Adds gaps between items and restores individual radii.

<div class="toggle-group" data-variant="outline" data-spacing ...>
  ...
</div>

Full specification → components/toggle-group/toggle-group.md
